backstory.original: Jaheira is a noble-born half-elf who was raised by an enclave of druids after her family was killed. Having gained an understanding of balance, she resolved to serve nature with the skills the druids taught her. She was recruited by the Harpers, where she met her late husband, Khalid. Jaheira knows life isn't black and white. She lives in the balance, as nature demands.
backstory.display: 贾希拉是出生于贵族的半精灵。家人被杀后，她在一块德鲁伊飞地被抚养长大。在获得对平衡的理解后，她决心用德鲁伊们教给她的技能来服务于自然。她被竖琴手同盟所招募，在那里遇到了她的丈夫哈立德。贾希拉知道生活并不是非黑即白，她生活在平衡之间，正如自然所希冀的那样。

description.original: Jaheira attacks the nearest enemy with her scimitar, dealing BUD damage and rooting them and nearby enemies in place with vines.
description.display: 贾希拉用她的弯刀攻击距离最近的敌人，造成基础杀招伤害，并用藤蔓将其与附近的敌人定在原地。

longDescription.original: Jaheira attacks the nearest enemy with her scimitar and then summons roots to hold them in place for 3 seconds. The roots also damage and root other nearby enemies.
longDescription.display: 贾希拉用她的弯刀攻击距离最近的敌人，然后召唤藤蔓将其暂时定在原地，持续 3 秒。藤蔓还会伤害和定身附近的其他敌人。

description.original: Jaheira blankets the area in front of the party with a swarm of insects for 30 seconds, dealing a small amount of damage to all enemies within the swarm every half-second.
description.display: 在 30 秒内，贾希拉用虫群覆盖队伍前方区域，每 0.5 秒对虫群范围内的所有敌人造成少量伤害。

longDescription.original: Jaheira blankets the area in front of the party with a swarm of insects for 30 seconds, dealing a small amount of damage to all enemies within the swarm every half-second.
longDescription.display: 在 30 秒内，贾希拉用虫群覆盖队伍前方区域，每 0.5 秒对虫群范围内的所有敌人造成少量伤害。

description.original: Jaheira is a fierce protector of those under her charge. Whenever a beast dies, her damage and buff is increased.
description.display: 贾希拉是她所管辖野兽的狂热保护者 。只要有野兽死亡，她的伤害和增益效果都会提高。

description.original: After a certain number of creatures she covets die Jaheira flies into a rage, further increasing her damage and buff.
description.display: 在贾希拉渴求的生物死亡达到一定数量后，她会进入盛怒，进一步提高伤害和增益效果。

description.desc: Jaheira increases the damage of Clerics, Wizards, Sorcerers, and Warlocks by $(amount)%.
贾希拉使所有牧师、法师、术士以及邪术师的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Jaheira focuses her support on Clerics, Wizards, Sorcerers, and Warlocks.
specializationDescription.display: 贾希拉专注于支援牧师、法师、术士和邪术师。

description.desc: Jaheira increases the damage of Barbarians, Fighters, Rogues and Monks by $(amount)%.
贾希拉使所有野蛮人、战士、游荡者以及武僧的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Jaheira focuses her support on Barbarians, Fighters, Rogues and Monks.
specializationDescription.display: 贾希拉专注于支援野蛮人、战士、游荡者和武僧。

description.desc: Jaheira increases the damage of Paladins, Rangers, Druids, and Bards by $(amount)%.
贾希拉使所有圣武士、巡林客、德鲁伊以及吟游诗人的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Jaheira focuses her support on Paladins, Rangers, Druids, and Bards.
specializationDescription.display: 贾希拉专注于支援圣武士、巡林客、德鲁伊和吟游诗人。

description.desc: Jaheira increases the damage of Champions from the Heroes of Baldur's Gate affiliation by $(amount)%.
贾希拉使所有“博德之门的英雄们”从属组织的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Jaheira focuses her support on the Heroes of Baldur's Gate.
specializationDescription.display: 贾希拉专注于支援博德之门的英雄们。

tipText.original: Jaheira supports certain classes. Make sure your main DPS Champion is a supported class!
tipText.display: 贾希拉可以支援特定职业。确保你的主要伤害输出勇士的职业受她支援！

description.desc: $(text_key tag___3) enemies are Jaheira's Favored Foe. When an enemy of her Favored Foe type is attacked (by any Champion), Jaheira gains a Hunter stack. This increases her damage by $(not_buffed amount)% per stack and increases the effect of Class Act by $(not_buffed amount___2)% per stack, stacking additively. Maximum $(max_stacks) stacks. Stacks are reset when you change areas.
$(text_key tag___3)敌人是贾希拉的偏好对手。当贾希拉的偏好对手类型受到（任意勇士的）攻击时，她将获得一层“猎人”堆叠。每层堆叠使她的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，并且每层堆叠使“出类拔萃”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠。最多堆叠 $(max_stacks) 层。变更区域时，堆叠重置。

tipText.original: Jaheira is a fierce hunter of certain creatures. Killing those enemies buff her other abilities.
tipText.display: 贾希拉是某些生物的狂热猎手。杀死这些敌人可以强化她的其他能力。

description.desc: After $(favored_foes_kills_to_trigger) of Jaheira's Favored Foes have been killed, this ability activates and she becomes more focused, increasing the effects of Fierce Hunter by $(not_buffed amount)% until you change areas.
杀死 $(favored_foes_kills_to_trigger) 个贾希拉的偏好对手以后，此技能激活，使她变得更加专注，狂热猎手的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，直到变更区域。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,100,9714,9715,9716,9717","description":"Increase the effect of Jaheira's Class Act ability by $(amount)%."}

description.desc: Jaheira gains $(time_stack) stack of Persistent Focus every $(stack_time) seconds while Battle Focus is active, and $(expire_stack) stack when it expires. This increases the damage of all Champions, including herself, by $(not_buffed amount)% per stack, stacking additively.
“战斗专注”激活期间，贾希拉每 $(stack_time) 秒获得 $(time_stack) 层全神贯注堆叠；结束后获得 $(expire_stack) 层堆叠。此堆叠可提高所有勇士的伤害，包括她自己。每层提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。
Increase the effect of Class Act by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion affected by it, stacking multiplicatively.
每位受到“出类拔萃”效果影响的勇士均使此技能的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
Jaheira continues to be a Fierce Hunter of Beast creatures.
贾希拉继续充当兽类生物的狂热猎手。

specializationDescription.original: Jaheira continues to focus on Beast enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 贾希拉继续关注兽类敌人。

description.desc: Fiends are Jaheira's new Favored Foe. Jaheira's Fierce Hunter and Battle Focus ability now trigger off of Fiend creatures instead of Beasts.
炼狱生物成为贾希拉的新偏好对手。贾希拉的狂热猎手和战斗专注技能现在会在炼狱生物而非兽类生物身上触发。

specializationDescription.original: Jaheira now focuses on Fiend enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 贾希拉现在专注于炼狱生物敌人。

description.desc: Humanoids are Jaheira's new Favored Foe. Jaheira's Fierce Hunter and Battle Focus ability now trigger off of Humanoid creatures instead of Beasts.
类人生物成为贾希拉的新偏好对手。贾希拉的狂热猎手和战斗专注技能现在会在类人生物而非兽类生物身上触发。

specializationDescription.original: Jaheira now focuses on Humanoid enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 贾希拉现在专注于类人生物敌人。

description.desc: Undead are Jaheira's new Favored Foe. Jaheira's Fierce Hunter and Battle Focus ability now trigger off of Undead creatures instead of Beasts.
亡灵成为贾希拉的新偏好对手。贾希拉的狂热猎手和战斗专注技能现在会在亡灵而非兽类生物身上触发。

specializationDescription.original: Jaheira now focuses on Undead enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 贾希拉现在专注于亡灵敌人。

贾希拉提升所有牧师、法师、术士以及邪术师的伤害 $amount%

贾希拉提升所有野蛮人、战士、游荡者以及武僧的伤害 $amount%

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"change_upgrade_data,9712","data":{"stack_time":20},"description":"Decreases the stack time of Jaheira's Persistent Focus to 20 seconds."}

description.original: You are amusing, in a 'what the hell is wrong with you' kinda way.
description.display: 你真搞笑，就是那种“这人有什么毛病吧”的搞笑。

description.original: No sorrow for those lost in righteous battles.
description.display: 不必为那些在正义之战中牺牲的人而感到悲伤。

description.original: Nature be well-armed and demands so of her servants!
description.display: 自然本身全副武装，对她的仆人也是如此要求。

description.original: You couldn't have made a better choice.
description.display: 你们原本可以做个更好的选择。

effects.description: Increase the effect of Jaheira's Class Act ability by $(amount)%.

description.original: There's nowhere you can go that I can't track you.
description.display: 哪怕逃到天涯海角，你也逃不出我的追踪。

description.original: The forest is my home, my friend -- you're out of your depth.
description.display: 森林是我的家园和朋友--你已无路可逃。

effects.description: Decreases the stack time of Jaheira's Persistent Focus to 20 seconds.

description.original: I'll stop when every enemy is down!
description.display: 当所有敌人都倒下时，我才会停手！

effects.description: Decreases the stack time of Jaheira's Persistent Focus to 10 seconds.

description.display: 对方绝难预料我们的行动！

description.original: I am only doing this to save Baldur's Gate...
description.display: 我只是在拯救博德之门……

description.original: I'm getting in touch with my roots.

effects.description: Increase the effect of Jaheira's Class Act ability by $(amount)%.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Jaheira is a noble-born half-elf who was raised by an enclave of druids after her family was killed. Having gained an understanding of balance, she resolved to serve nature with the skills the druids taught her. She was recruited by the Harpers, where she met her late husband, Khalid. Jaheira knows life isn't black and white. She lives in the balance, as nature demands.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Fiercely protective of the environment, she enrages when creatures of a certain type are being killed, even by herself. Kill enough of them and she goes into a primal rage.

event_upgrades.name: Fierce Hunter
event_upgrades.description: Jaheira is a fierce protector of those under her charge. Whenever a beast dies, her damage and buff is increased.

event_upgrades.name: Battle Focus
event_upgrades.description: After a certain number of creatures she covets die Jaheira flies into a rage, further increasing her damage and buff.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 贾希拉是出生于贵族的半精灵。家人被杀后，她在一块德鲁伊飞地被抚养长大。在获得对平衡的理解后，她决心用德鲁伊们教给她的技能来服务于自然。她被竖琴手同盟所招募，在那里遇到了她的丈夫哈立德。贾希拉知道生活并不是非黑即白，她生活在平衡之间，正如自然所希冀的那样。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 她对环境具有强烈的保护意识，当某种类型的生物被击杀（即使是被她自己所杀），她会被激怒。足够数量的该类型生物死亡后，她会进入原始激怒。

event_upgrades.name: 狂热猎手
event_upgrades.description: 贾希拉是她所管辖野兽的狂热保护者 。只要有野兽死亡，她的伤害和增益效果都会提高。

event_upgrades.name: 战斗专注
event_upgrades.description: 在贾希拉渴求的生物死亡达到一定数量后，她会进入盛怒，进一步提高伤害和增益效果。

original.description: Jaheira attacks the nearest enemy with her scimitar, dealing BUD damage and rooting them and nearby enemies in place with vines.
original.long_description: Jaheira attacks the nearest enemy with her scimitar and then summons roots to hold them in place for 3 seconds. The roots also damage and root other nearby enemies.

display.description: 贾希拉用她的弯刀攻击距离最近的敌人，造成基础杀招伤害，并用藤蔓将其与附近的敌人定在原地。
display.long_description: 贾希拉用她的弯刀攻击距离最近的敌人，然后召唤藤蔓将其暂时定在原地，持续 3 秒。藤蔓还会伤害和定身附近的其他敌人。

display.description: 不必为那些在正义之战中牺牲的人而感到悲伤。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Nature be well-armed and demands so of her servants!

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 自然本身全副武装，对她的仆人也是如此要求。

original.name: Gate Warden
original.description: You couldn't have made a better choice.

effects.description: Increase the effect of Jaheira's Class Act ability by $(amount)%.

display.name: 博德之门守望者
display.description: 你们原本可以做个更好的选择。

effects.description: 使贾希拉的“出类拔萃”技能效果提高 $(amount)%。
Decreases the stack time of Jaheira's Persistent Focus to 20 seconds.
贾希拉的“全神贯注”堆叠时间减少到 20 秒。

original.name: Dogged Pursuit
original.description: There's nowhere you can go that I can't track you.

display.name: 穷追不舍
display.description: 哪怕逃到天涯海角，你也逃不出我的追踪。

original.name: Wild Stalker
original.description: The forest is my home, my friend -- you're out of your depth.

display.name: 野地追踪者
display.description: 森林是我的家园和朋友--你已无路可逃。

original.name: Clear the Field
original.description: I'll stop when every enemy is down!

effects.description: Decreases the stack time of Jaheira's Persistent Focus to 10 seconds.

display.name: 清理现场
display.description: 当所有敌人都倒下时，我才会停手！

effects.description: 贾希拉的“全神贯注”堆叠时间减少到 10 秒。

display.name: 迅敏
display.description: 对方绝难预料我们的行动！

original.name: Illithid Tadpole
original.description: I am only doing this to save Baldur's Gate...

display.name: 灵吸怪蝌蚪
display.description: 我只是在拯救博德之门……

original.name: Sylvan Calling
original.description: I'm getting in touch with my roots.

effects.description: Increase the effect of Jaheira's Class Act ability by $(amount)%.
使贾希拉的“出类拔萃”技能效果提高 $(amount)%。
